scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun run build:chrome && bun run build:firefox
scripts.build:chrome: rm -rf dist/chrome dist/chrome.crx dist/chrome.pem && MARKITY_TARGET=chrome vite build && MARKITY_TARGET=chrome vite build -c vite.content.config.ts && MARKITY_TARGET=chrome vite build -c vite.background.config.ts && bun scripts/manifest.ts chrome
scripts.build:firefox: rm -rf dist/firefox && MARKITY_TARGET=firefox vite build && MARKITY_TARGET=firefox vite build -c vite.content.config.ts && MARKITY_TARGET=firefox vite build -c vite.background.config.ts && bun scripts/manifest.ts firefox
